summary: Plan-mode classification only. The live canonical for this cluster remains open issue #86572. Open PR #86584 is a related implementation candidate for the same embedded session-fence false-takeover family, but this job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and lacks merge preflight, so no mutating action is planned. Linked security-sensitive ref #85341 is quarantined with a scoped route_security action only.

actions.reason: #86572 is the best live canonical issue for the root cause represented by this job. It should stay open for validation and follow-up.
#86584 is a useful open implementation candidate related to #86572, but this plan-mode job cannot merge it or close the issue as fixed by it.
Security-sensitive linked ref is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
